name: Ostium
description: Ostium SDK tool bridge for read and write actions on Arbitrum.

allowWrites.description: Enable write actions like open/close/update trade.

defaultNetwork.description: Default Ostium network when tool input omits network.

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run the Ostium bridge script.

runnerPath.description: Optional absolute path override for the Python runner script.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for each Ostium runner invocation.

rpcUrlEnvVar.description: Environment variable name for the RPC URL.

privateKeyEnvVar.description: Environment variable name for the wallet private key.

useDelegation.description: Enable delegatedAction behavior in the SDK.
